title: Add OAuth connect/disconnect buttons to frontend setup page
goal: 프론트엔드 setup 페이지에 Google Calendar/Gmail 연결 버튼을 추가한다. 'Connect' 클릭 시 /setup/connections/{id}/authorize 호출 후 OAuth URL을 새 창으로 열고, 연결 완료 후 상태를 갱신한다. 연결된 서비스에는 'Disconnect' 버튼을 표시한다.

test_requirements.expected: function calls POST /setup/connections/{id}/callback with code and state

test_requirements.case: Available connection card shows Connect button for google_calendar
test_requirements.expected: button with onClick that calls authorizeConnection and opens auth_url

test_requirements.case: Connected connection card shows Disconnect button
test_requirements.expected: button with onClick that calls disconnectConnection and refreshes status

test_requirements.case: Connect button shows loading state while OAuth in progress
test_requirements.expected: button disabled with spinner/text during connecting

constraints: Use existing openExternalUrl() from lib/external.ts for opening OAuth URL
Follow existing button patterns (gray-900 bg for primary, red for destructive)
Use existing useLanguage() t() for any new strings
Do not add new npm dependencies
OAuth callback handling: after user returns, poll /setup/status every 2 seconds for 30 seconds to detect connection state change
Maintain existing responsive layout and Tailwind classes
